title: K-EXT-002 Negative Fixture
description: Minimal kernel that uses a non-reserved vendor x-* namespace at root. K-EXT-002 MUST NOT emit a warning for x-acme-* keys; only the reserved x-wos-* namespace is gated.

x-acme-foo.note: Vendor-authored extension outside the reserved x-wos-* namespace; must NOT trigger K-EXT-002.
